action.reasoning: Observation: albumentations init error on RandomResizedCrop (size field required in pydantic schema for this version; height/width not accepted). No training/eval in prior iters. Analysis: transform API mismatch (common in albumentations>=1.4); core pipeline (ResNet50 FCN, label remapping 0->255/1-150->0-149, DataParallel for 4 GPUs, metric logging to JSONL, predict contract with batch resize+NN resize back to orig res) is otherwise sound and matches all specs. Decision: fix only the transform param to size=(512,512), keep simple baseline, train 3 epochs, submit best.pt for first mIoU + time measurement before scaling model/backbone/augs/epochs.
